'''OrulShai III''' was a moon of [[Gyosha]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. It supported [[Human/Legends|Humans]] ruled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Wilek Nereus]] was a native of the moon. [[Sena Pakkallo]] once treated him for a parasitic disorder on the moon.
